infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoAttend needs your location to verify attendance when you're in the classroom.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GeoAttend needs background location access to automatically track attendance even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GeoAttend needs background location access to automatically track attendance even when the app is closed.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow GeoAttend to use your location to verify attendance.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow GeoAttend to use your location for automatic attendance tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow GeoAttend to use your location to verify attendance.
